meta.title: From HERRING to BONE
meta.message: The herringbone is a cross-country skiing technique for climbing steep hills where the skier points the ski tips outward in a V-shape while pushing off the inside edges, creating a pattern in the snow that resembles a fish skeleton.

ladder.clue: Change one letter in <> to get a thrill
Reverse the last two letters of <>, then add a letter, to get a popular franchise
One <> captain was known to say this a lot

Appropriately sweet title for some kids who might sell you <>s
Drop every other letter from <> to get something inside you
